message:
fix: sanitize branch names in Dolt SQL operations to prevent injection (gt-5qxuk)

Add validateBranchName() that rejects branch names containing characters
that could break out of SQL string literals in Dolt stored procedure calls.
Applied to all 4 call sites: CreatePolecatBranch, MergePolecatBranch (2),
and DeletePolecatBranch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
